name: HR Processing Worker - Multi Provider Test

parameters.query:
WITH picked AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM candidate_inputs
    WHERE processing_status = 'prepared'
    ORDER BY created_at ASC
    LIMIT 1
    FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
updated AS (
    UPDATE candidate_inputs ci
    SET processing_status = 'processing'
    FROM picked
    WHERE ci.id = picked.id
    RETURNING
        ci.id AS candidate_input_id,
        ci.intake_event_id,
        ci.execution_id,
        ci.source,
        ci.input_type,
        ci.original_text,
        ci.normalized_text,
        ci.processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        updated.execution_id,
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'processing_started',
        updated.processing_status,
        'Candidate input claimed by Processing Worker',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT
    u.*,
    ie.telegram_chat_id AS chat_id,
    ie.telegram_user_id AS user_id
FROM updated u
CROSS JOIN logged
LEFT JOIN intake_events ie
    ON ie.id = u.intake_event_id;

nodes.name: Prepare OpenAI Body: Extract candidate JSON
Prepare OpenAI Body: Repair candidate JSON

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    ...$json,
    error_stage: 'processing',
    error_type: 'invalid_resume',
    error_message: 'Extracted candidate profile is not meaningful',
    error_recoverable: true,
    response_channel: 'telegram',
    response_recipient: $json.chat_id ? String($json.chat_id) : null,
    response_message_type: 'invalid_input',
    response_subject: null,
    response_body:
`⚠️ Не удалось распознать резюме

Похоже, в сообщении недостаточно данных.

Попробуйте отправить:
• текст резюме
• PDF/DOCX
• более чёткое фото
• голосовое сообщение с ФИО, опытом и навыками`
  }
}];

parameters.query:
WITH matches AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS candidate_id,
        c.full_name,
        c.desired_position,
        cc.contact_type,
        cc.normalized_value
    FROM candidates c
    JOIN candidate_contacts cc
        ON cc.candidate_id = c.id
    WHERE
        (
            '{{ $json.candidate.email_normalized || "" }}' <> ''
            AND cc.contact_type = 'email'
            AND cc.normalized_value = '{{ $json.candidate.email_normalized || "" }}'
        )
        OR
        (
            '{{ $json.candidate.phone_normalized || "" }}' <> ''
            AND cc.contact_type = 'phone'
            AND cc.normalized_value = '{{ $json.candidate.phone_normalized || "" }}'
        )
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        candidate_id,
        MAX(full_name) AS full_name,
        MAX(desired_position) AS desired_position,
        BOOL_OR(contact_type = 'email') AS email_match,
        BOOL_OR(contact_type = 'phone') AS phone_match,
        COUNT(*) AS matched_contacts
    FROM matches
    GROUP BY candidate_id
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS matched_candidates_count,

        (ARRAY_AGG(candidate_id) FILTER (WHERE email_match AND phone_match))[1] AS exact_candidate_id,
        (ARRAY_AGG(candidate_id) FILTER (WHERE email_match))[1] AS email_candidate_id,
        (ARRAY_AGG(candidate_id) FILTER (WHERE phone_match))[1] AS phone_candidate_id
    FROM grouped
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN matched_candidates_count = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN exact_candidate_id IS NOT NULL THEN exact_candidate_id
        WHEN matched_candidates_count = 1 THEN COALESCE(email_candidate_id, phone_candidate_id)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS candidate_id,

    CASE
        WHEN matched_candidates_count = 0 THEN 'not_found'
        WHEN exact_candidate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'exact_duplicate'
        WHEN matched_candidates_count = 1 THEN 'probable_duplicate'
        ELSE 'contact_conflict'
    END AS dedup_result,

    matched_candidates_count,
    email_candidate_id,
    phone_candidate_id
FROM summary;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO candidates (
        full_name,
        city,
        desired_position,
        experience_years,
        skills,
        salary_expectation,
        candidate_summary,
        source_input_id
    )
    VALUES (
        '{{ ($json.candidate.full_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.city || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.desired_position || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        {{ $json.candidate.experience_years || 'null' }},
        ARRAY[{{ ($json.candidate.skills || []).map(s => "'" + String(s).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(",") }}]::text[],
        {{ $json.candidate.salary_expectation || 'null' }},
        '{{ ($json.candidate.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ $json.candidate_input_id }}'
    )
    RETURNING id
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        'candidate_saved',
        'success',
        'New candidate saved to candidates',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO candidate_contacts (
        candidate_id,
        contact_type,
        contact_value,
        normalized_value,
        is_primary
    )
    VALUES
    (
        '{{ $json.candidate_id }}',
        'email',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.email_normalized || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        true
    ),
    (
        '{{ $json.candidate_id }}',
        'phone',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.candidate.phone_normalized || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        false
    )
    ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
    RETURNING id
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        'candidate_contacts_saved',
        'success',
        'Candidate contacts saved to candidate_contacts',
        NULL,
        1
    )
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS contacts_saved
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        'matching_started',
        'started',
        'Loading open vacancies for candidate_id={{ $json.candidate_id }}',
        NULL,
        1
    )
)
SELECT
    '{{ $json.execution_id }}' AS execution_id,
    '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}' AS intake_event_id,
    '{{ $json.candidate_input_id }}' AS candidate_input_id,
    '{{ $json.candidate_id }}' AS candidate_id,
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.candidate).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS candidate,
    jsonb_build_object(
        'id', id,
        'title', title,
        'description', description,
        'requirements', requirements,
        'salary_min', salary_min,
        'salary_max', salary_max
    ) AS vacancy
FROM vacancies
CROSS JOIN logged
WHERE status = 'open'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

nodes.name: Prepare OpenAI Body: Match candidate vacancy

parameters.query:
WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO matches (
        candidate_id,
        vacancy_id,
        score,
        decision,
        reason,
        raw_llm_response
    )
    VALUES (
        '{{ $json.candidate_id }}',
        '{{ $json.match_result.vacancy_id || $json.vacancy.id }}',
        {{ Number($json.match_result.score || 0) }},
        '{{ $json.match_result.decision || "no_match" }}',
        '{{ ($json.match_result.reason || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ JSON.stringify($json.match_result).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
    )
    RETURNING id, candidate_id, vacancy_id, score, decision
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        'match_saved',
        inserted.decision,
        'Match result saved for vacancy_id=' || inserted.vacancy_id || ', score=' || inserted.score,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id, inserted.candidate_id, inserted.vacancy_id, inserted.score, inserted.decision
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO final_decisions (
        candidate_id,
        best_match_id,
        has_match,
        decision_status,
        decision_reason
    )
    VALUES (
        '{{ $json.candidate_id }}',
        '{{ $json.best_match.match_id }}',
        {{ $json.has_match }},
        '{{ $json.has_match ? "match" : "no_match" }}',
        '{{ ($json.best_match.reason || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    )
    RETURNING id, candidate_id, has_match, decision_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        'decision_made',
        inserted.decision_status,
        'Final decision saved: ' || inserted.decision_status,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id, inserted.candidate_id, inserted.has_match, inserted.decision_status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
       NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
       NULLIF('{{ $json.candidate_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
        '{{ $json.response_channel }}',
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF('{{ $json.response_recipient || "" }}', ''),
            (
                SELECT telegram_chat_id::text
                FROM intake_events
                WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
                LIMIT 1
            )
        ),
        '{{ $json.response_message_type }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULLIF('{{ JSON.stringify($json.telegram_reply_markup || null).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'null')::jsonb,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING
        id,
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'final_response_prepared',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram response prepared in outbox, type=' || inserted.message_type,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT
    id AS outbox_id,
    intake_event_id,
    candidate_id,
    channel,
    recipient,
    message_type,
    body,
    reply_markup,
    status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE candidate_inputs
    SET processing_status = 'done'
    WHERE id = '{{ $("Build TG response").first().json.candidate_input_id }}'
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, execution_id, processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        updated.execution_id,
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'processing_done',
        updated.processing_status,
        'Processing completed successfully',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.processing_status
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
       NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
       NULLIF('{{ $json.candidate_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
        '{{ $json.response_channel }}',
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF('{{ $json.response_recipient || "" }}', ''),
            (
                SELECT telegram_chat_id::text
                FROM intake_events
                WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
                LIMIT 1
            )
        ),
        '{{ $json.response_message_type }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULLIF('{{ JSON.stringify($json.telegram_reply_markup || null).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'null')::jsonb,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING
        id,
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'outbox_prepared',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram response prepared in outbox, type=' || inserted.message_type,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT
    id AS outbox_id,
    intake_event_id,
    candidate_id,
    channel,
    recipient,
    message_type,
    body,
    reply_markup,
    status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE candidate_inputs
    SET processing_status = 'error'
    WHERE id = '{{ $("Build TG invalid resume response").first().json.candidate_input_id }}'
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, execution_id, processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        updated.execution_id,
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'processing_error',
        'error',
        '{{ ($("Build TG invalid resume response").first().json.error_type || "invalid_resume").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($("Build TG invalid resume response").first().json.error_message || "Invalid resume").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.processing_status
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
       NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,

        '{{ $json.response_channel }}',
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF('{{ $json.response_recipient || "" }}', ''),
            (
                SELECT telegram_chat_id::text
                FROM intake_events
                WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
                LIMIT 1
            )
        ),
        '{{ $json.response_message_type }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULLIF('{{ JSON.stringify($json.telegram_reply_markup || null).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'null')::jsonb,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING
        id,
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        body,

        status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'outbox_prepared',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram response prepared in outbox, type=' || inserted.message_type,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT
    id AS outbox_id,

    channel,

    message_type,
    body,

nodes.name: PG: insert outbox pending JSON error

parameters.query:
WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE candidate_inputs
    SET processing_status = 'error'
    WHERE id = '{{ $("Build TG error response").first().json.candidate_input_id }}'
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, execution_id, processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        updated.execution_id,
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'processing_error',
        'error',
        '{{ ($("Build TG error response").first().json.error_type || "candidate_json_error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($("Build TG error response").first().json.error_message || "Candidate JSON parsing failed").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.processing_status
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
        NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
        NULL,
        '{{ $json.response_channel }}',
        '{{ $json.response_recipient }}',
        '{{ $json.response_message_type }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULLIF('{{ JSON.stringify($json.telegram_reply_markup || null).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'null')::jsonb,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING id
)
SELECT id AS outbox_id
FROM inserted;

WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE candidate_inputs
    SET processing_status = 'error'
    WHERE id = '{{ $json.candidate_input_id }}'
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, execution_id, processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        COALESCE(updated.execution_id, '{{ $json.execution_id || "unknown" }}'),
        updated.intake_event_id,
        'processing_error',
        'error',
        '{{ ($json.error_type || "processing_error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.error_message || "Processing error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.processing_status
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
       NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
       NULLIF('{{ $json.candidate_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
        '{{ $json.response_channel || "telegram" }}',
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF('{{ $json.response_recipient || "" }}', ''),
            (
                SELECT telegram_chat_id::text
                FROM intake_events
                WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
                LIMIT 1
            )
        ),
        '{{ $json.response_message_type || "processing_error" }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "⚠️ Не удалось обработать резюме. Попробуйте отправить его ещё раз или в другом формате.").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULL,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id || "unknown" }}',
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'fallback_prepared',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram fallback prepared after processing error',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id AS outbox_id, inserted.status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;
